subject_profile.summary: Base country-level assessment; default category weights prioritize rule of law, institutional integrity, and personal freedom.
stated_values: Rule of law and institutional integrity weighted most heavily
Personal freedom and security from arbitrary state action are foundational
Economic success is contingent on rule of law, not a substitute for it

flags: Generated 2026-05-28 under v2.0: governance/rights/politics rebuilt from independent sources (IMF Art IV 2025, World Bank, ADB, V-Dem, RSF, Freedom House, HRW, Amnesty, TI, CSIS) + independent/exile press; Cambodian state media EXCLUDED there.
An entrenched one-party Hun dynasty, heavily China-aligned, with a notorious online-scam-center industry a major illicit and reputational drag.
Standout drags: no judicial independence, a jailed/exiled opposition, a scam-economy/trafficking hub, and China-alignment; low dollar-anchored inflation and a young population are offsets.

economic.notes: Low debt and dollar-anchored inflation, against a dollarized no-policy-lever model and property/scam-economy risk.

fiscal_state.notes: Low debt with a low distress risk, but a widening primary deficit, a narrow revenue base, and LDC-graduation finance loss ahead. (IMF Art IV 2025; World Bank)

monetary_independence.notes: Heavy deposit dollarization leaves little real monetary lever; de-dollarization stalled. (IMF Art IV 2025)

reserve_currency_intl_monetary.notes: The riel is not held externally. (IMF)

banking_stability.notes: Rising NPLs, property oversupply, a fast prior credit cycle, and no lender of last resort under dollarization. (IMF Art IV 2025)

trade_actions_capacity.notes: Garments, tourism, and construction, but a vast online-scam economy and an LDC/tariff risk, with growth slowing. (IMF; UNODC; CSIS)

institutional.notes: No judicial independence and among the worst press environments.

rule_of_law.notes: No judicial independence, entrenched party patronage, and deep corruption. (Freedom House 2025; TI)

statistical_integrity.notes: IMF-engaged macro data usable; opacity beyond it. (IMF)

civil_service_capacity.notes: Patronage-driven and weak, with cosmetic anti-corruption purges. (Freedom House 2025)

press_freedom.notes: Independent media shut, accreditation tightening, and a journalist killed - a very poor RSF standing. (RSF; Freedom House)

political_social.notes: An entrenched but brittle dynasty with a crushed opposition, against a young population.

political_stability.notes: A Hun dynasty (a 2023 succession) entrenched after dissolving the opposition - stable now but brittle and succession-dependent. (Freedom House 2025)

civil_liberties.notes: The opposition jailed or exiled, with no real assembly or association. (Freedom House; HRW)

treatment_non_citizens.notes: Easy affluent residency but no path to belonging under an authoritarian ceiling. (observed)

social_cohesion.notes: Managed, with land-rights and inequality grievances. (HRW)

demographics.notes: A young population with a favourable dependency ratio. (World Bank)

geopolitical.notes: Heavily China-aligned, with a 2025 border flare-up and scam-center friction.

alliance_reliability.notes: Heavily China-aligned (the Ream naval base, BRI) and an ASEAN outlier. (CSIS; Crisis Group)

conflict_involvement.notes: A July-2025 Thai-border armed clash (a fragile ceasefire) and scam-center diplomatic friction. (CSIS; ICG)

sanctions_capital_controls.notes: Targeted Western sanctions on scam-linked individuals; open-ish capital. (US Treasury)

physical_practical.notes: Mekong climate exposure and weak healthcare, with a scam/trafficking-hub crime concern.

climate.notes: High vulnerability, low readiness - Mekong-flow disruption, flood/drought, Tonle Sap stress. (ND-GAIN; IPCC AR6)

healthcare.notes: Low public spend and a weak system. (World Bank)

infrastructure.notes: Improving via Chinese BRI investment but uneven and debt-tied. (World Bank)

crime_safety.notes: Moderate street crime plus a major online-scam-center and trafficking hub. (UNODC; CSIS)

summary: An entrenched one-party state run as a family dynasty after dissolving the opposition, heavily China-aligned, with low debt and dollar-anchored low inflation but a dollarized economy that lacks a monetary lever and carries property and banking risk. A notorious online-scam-center industry is a major illicit and reputational drag, drawing targeted Western sanctions, and a 2025 armed clash on the Thai border added a conflict tail. No judicial independence, a jailed/exiled opposition, among the worst press environments, weak healthcare, and Mekong climate exposure round out a negative profile; a young population is the main offset.
